items.name_en: Anjou Mini Limited Custom Heart Style вҖ” Black/Red Heart
items.name_cn:
Anjou Mini Limited Custom Heart Style вҖ” Black/Red Heart
Double-sided mini tote. The patterned side uses custom high-quality rain-silk consistent with ZPгҖҪпёҸ, then coated with glossy shellac [Witty] The grain texture rivals ZP, achieving a look that is both glossy and matteрҹӨҹ The leather is top-grain calfskinрҹ‘ӣ soft and flexibleрҹ’Ә Plus custom hand-painted designs, allowing for three styles in one bag. Includes bag charm and pouchрҹҺҖвһ•gift boxрҹҺҒвһ•upgraded manualрҹ’Ң
Size: Top 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm

Anjou Mini Limited Custom Heart Style вҖ” Black/Small Red Heart

The patterned side features custom high-quality rain-dew linen гҖҪпёҸ, finished with a glossy resin coating [Witty] The grain texture rivals ZP, achieving a look that is both glossy and matte рҹӨҹ.
